content:
Overall, this is a strong start, and with a few refinements, your materials will be even more compelling. Keep up the great work!

Best,
Professor Padavano

⸻

Letter for Karla Guerrero

Dear Karla,

Thank you for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve put together a strong foundation, and with some small adjustments, your materials will be even more polished.

Your cover letter is well-structured, and you do a good job of explaining why you’re interested in the digital marketing position. However, some of the phrasing could be refined for better clarity. For example, the sentence “I have had many experiences and have gained many skills that I believe make me the perfect candidate” is a bit vague—it would be stronger to mention specific experiences that showcase your skills. Additionally, you mention the company’s values, but adding a sentence explaining why their mission resonates with you would make your letter even more compelling.

Your resume is clear and well-organized. Your work experience is relevant, and your skills section highlights important qualities like communication and teamwork. However, the objective statement is quite broad—you could make it more specific to digital marketing to better align with the job you’re applying for. Also, consider adding more detail under your work experience to show specific accomplishments or contributions in each role.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 5 (chunk 5/22)
